features.name: output port read back in combinational XOR assignment
features.description: Code should include a module where one output port is driven by an input and then the same output port is used as an operand in the combinational XOR expression that drives a second output port

features.name: intermediate wire holding XOR of input and output port
features.description: Code should include an intermediate wire assigned the XOR of a primary input and a combinational output port, with the intermediate wire then forwarded to a second output port

features.name: hierarchical module instantiation with fully mirrored I/O ports
features.description: Code should include a top-level module that instantiates a submodule and directly connects every submodule port to a matching top-level port with no additional logic
